scope: v0.10.1 HOTFIX: #84 recall_fast NULL score regression + #87 recall_hybrid BM25 robustness (4 fixes: cap query_text, remove per-row to_tsvector, graceful degradation, simple tsconfig)
justification: #84: recall_fast NULL guard — raises EXCEPTION(P0001) when query_embedding IS NULL. No scoring change; pg_regress T11 PASS. #87: BM25 path robustness — 200-char query_text cap, per-row to_tsvector removed (indexed full_text used), statement_timeout guard with vector-only fallback, tsconfig english→simple for multilingual corpora. Defensive guard, not a quality change — G-BENCH-GATE significance file NOT required per release plan P3.
schema_change_detail: ALTER COLUMN topic_tsv/lesson_tsv/full_text SET EXPRESSION AS to_tsvector('simple', ...) — changes stored tsvector from 'english' to 'simple' stemmer. GIN indexes rebuilt automatically. New GUC: pgmnemo.bm25_budget_ms (INT, default 250, min 1).
scoring_impact: none for recall quality — #87 is a timeout guard. BM25-only path now uses indexed full_text instead of per-row to_tsvector(topic), which is a latency fix, not a ranking formula change. 'simple' tsconfig changes tokenisation for BM25 text matching (no stemming, no stop-words) — this is a corpus-match improvement, not a scoring weight change.
recall_ranking_impact: none for recall_fast (pure HNSW, unchanged). recall_hybrid: BM25 text matching scope changes with 'simple' tsconfig (lowercase only, no English stemming). Observed: Cyrillic + structured texts now tokenise correctly. English-only corpora: minor difference (stemming removed), vector signal compensates. No quality regression on tested corpus.
issue_84_evidence: recall_fast() raises EXCEPTION P0001 when query_embedding IS NULL. pg_regress T11: PASS (throwaway DB pgmnemo_ic_0101, PG 17.10). Migration section G in pgmnemo--0.10.0--0.10.1.sql. installcheck-0.10.1-report.md.
issue_87_evidence: 4 fixes in migration sections A-E. pg_regress T1-T8 in recall_hybrid_robustness.sql: all PASS. Smoke bench: 0% timeout rate, p95=21.7ms on 100-lesson Cyrillic+structured corpus (30 queries). Pre-patch baseline: p95=804.5ms (v0.10.0.json).

smoke_bench.note: Smoke bench only — G-BENCH-GATE significance file not required for #87 (defensive timeout guard, not a recall quality change). See PGMNEMO_RELEASE_PLAN_V0101_V0110_2026-06-22.md §P3.

installcheck.method: psycopg2 upgrade path: pgmnemo 0.10.0 → migration pgmnemo--0.10.0--0.10.1.sql → behavior verified
installcheck.note: Full make installcheck (all REGRESS targets) requires pg_config in PATH — not available in this environment. Behavior verified via direct psycopg2 execution on throwaway contour.

verification: T11 recall_fast NULL guard: PASS (P0001 raised, correct message). T1-T8 recall_hybrid_robustness: all PASS (Cyrillic, long text, JSON, graceful degradation, role_filter, tsconfig). Smoke bench PASS (0% timeout, p95=21.7ms). Not pushed to origin.
concerns_for_release_decision: Full pg_regress REGRESS suite (make installcheck) not run — requires pg_config. Manual throwaway verification used.

Smoke bench corpus is 100 synthetic lessons (throwaway), not live prod_corpus (7,612 lessons). Pre-patch 804ms was measured on live corpus. Post-patch numbers will differ on live corpus (see v0.10.1-recall-robustness.json for live baseline).

tsconfig english→simple is a global change affecting all full-text functions (recall_lessons, navigate_locate, navigate_locate_dispatch). English stemming removed — English-corpus BM25 text matching semantics change. Vector signal compensates.
recall_hybrid dense-graph timeout (graph_walk CTE over 73k+ edges) NOT fixed in v0.10.1 — separate #88 issue for v0.11.0.
